_comment: p95 budgets in milliseconds for Orka hot paths. Probe names match src/perf_smoke.rs exactly. At low iteration counts the first cold-cache call dominates p95 — budgets are set above that to avoid flakes while still catching 2x+ regressions. Run with `npm run perf:check -- 20` for tighter numbers. Source of truth: docs/TESTING-PLAN.md.
